subject: [PATCH v9 08/15] mm: handle VM_UFFD_RWP in khugepaged, rmap, and GUP

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch extends three mm paths outside the fault handler gate to treat VM_UFFD_RWP (User Faultfd Read-Write Protected) the same as VM_UFFD_WP. The affected paths are khugepaged, rmap, and GUP. In khugepaged, ranges carrying the uffd PTE bit are now protected from collapse or retraction. In rmap, batching is capped at 1 for VM_UFFD_RWP to ensure each PTE can be handled individually. In GUP, a fault is forced on VM_UFFD_RWP VMAs regardless of FOLL_HONOR_NUMA_FAULT, as RWP uses protnone as an access-tracking marker rather than for NUMA hinting.
